name.description: Specifies the name for the table, must be unique for the schema in which the table is created

cluster_by.description: Specifies one or more columns or column expressions in the table as the clustering key

external_volume.description: Specifies the name of the external volume to use for the table

base_location.description: Specifies the path to a directory where Snowflake can write data and metadata files for the table

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the table
